steps.title: Set up the narrative
steps.content: To begin a narrative about Wong's web series, the sentence should introduce Wong, identify the series, and establish a starting point in time. The useful notes are his role, the 2012 launch, and the series title and genre.

steps.title: Avoid ending details first
steps.content: B starts with later praise and an award nomination and omits Wong. C mentions Wong but not the series name. D names the series but omits Wong and gives only a vague award reference. The strongest opener launches the story with Wong, year, genre, and title. The answer is A.
